def negative_pandas_chain_assignment_warning():
    rule_id = "pandas_chain_assignment_warning"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Chained DataFrame assignment patterns risk SettingWithCopy-style behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
